span.p:
Control transfers next period
(e.g., FOB destination, arrives Jan 3)

span.p:
When did CONTROL transfer (ASC 606)?
Shipping-term proxy: FOB shipping point =
at the dock; FOB destination = on delivery

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
When were the GOODS/SERVICES RECEIVED?
(receiving-report / service date --
NOT the invoice or payment date)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Recognize NEXT period -- do not pull forward

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Recognize THIS period.
If no invoice yet -> GR/IR accrual
(reverses on AP match)
